protocol.name: ext_image_capture_source_v1

interface.name: ext_image_capture_source_v1
interface.description: This object serves as an intermediary between capturing protocols and potential image capture sources such as outputs and toplevels. This protocol may be extended to support more image capture sources in the future, thereby adding those image capture sources to other protocols that use the image capture source object without having to modify those protocols.

interface.name: ext_output_image_capture_source_manager_v1

description.summary: manager for output image capture sources

interface.description: This object is a manager for creating ext_image_capture_source_v1 objects from wl_output objects.

request.name: create_source

description.summary: create an image capture source from an output

request.description: Create an image capture source for the given wl_output.

request.name: destroy
request.description: Destroy the manager object. Other objects created via this manager are unaffected.

interface.name: ext_toplevel_image_capture_source_manager_v1

description.summary: manager for toplevel image capture sources

interface.description: This object is a manager for creating ext_image_capture_source_v1 objects from toplevels.

request.name: create_source

description.summary: create an image capture source from a toplevel

request.description: Create an image capture source for the given toplevel.

request.name: destroy
request.description: Destroy the manager object. Other objects created via this manager are unaffected.
